security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:5173 http://localhost:5173; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: A local, copy only prompt library.
bundle.longDescription: Prompt Bank is a local, file based, copy only prompt library. Built in prompts ship with the app, and your own global and folder prompts are read at runtime and never leave your machine.
